1800250.name: Void Soul Awakening
1800250.description:
Trapped within the Abyssal Cube, an ever-shifting prison that defies reality, lost souls wander endlessly in search of release. You awaken as one of them, an immortal vessel haunted by echoes of a forgotten past, bound to a world that refuses to let you die.

Each rebirth pulls you deeper into the prison’s secrets. Faces blur between dream and memory, and unseen forces whisper of freedom just beyond reach. To break the cycle, you must face the nightmares that shaped this world and the truth that waits within yourself.

FEATURES:

Hybrid gameplay of shooter and Hack & Slash

  • Hack, Slash, and Shoot as One Seamlessly blend melee combat and third-person gunplay in fast-paced, fluid battles. Switch between styles mid-fight to chain devastating combos and control the flow of combat.

  • Soul Energy System Every bullet, blast, and sorcery consumes Soul Energy. To replenish it, you must dive back into melee  striking foes with your Soul Weapon to draw power from their essence.

  • Sorceries of Power Unleash destructive abilities fueled by your stored energy  from spectral barrages to reality warping curses.

  • Adapt to Survive True mastery lies in balance: knowing when to strike up close, when to retreat and shoot, and when to unleash your stored fury.

  • Every Fight Feeds the Next Aggression isn’t just encouraged it’s survival. The more you fight, the stronger and deadlier you become.

Adaptability:

  • 50+ Firearms Discover an arsenal ranging from precision rifles and rapid pistols to cursed launchers that reshape the battlefield. Each weapon offers unique stats and effects.

  • 30+ Sorceries Command the void with devastating abilities summon spectral claws, ignite soul storms, or warp reality itself. Every sorcery changes how you fight.

  • 20+ Spirits (Playstyles) Spirits define your core identity each one alters movement, abilities, and stats, allowing for radically different playstyles.

  • 20+ Soul Weapons Harness melee weapons forged from pure essence each one carrying unique traits, movesets, and elemental affinities that feed your Soul Energy system.

  • Adaptive Styles Manifestations of lost souls that shape your playstyle called Echoes. Each Echo grants unique abilities and passive traits, letting you tailor your combat approach from relentless melee pressure to agile evasion or ranged precision.

  • Evolve Every Run Weapons, sorceries, and styles are randomized, ensuring no two runs feel the same. Adapt on the fly and craft your own path to survival.

  • Master Adaptability Every encounter pushes you to reforge your tactics and embrace the chaos becoming the embodiment of evolution itself.

Challenging Bosses:

  • 30+ Intense Boss Battles Every dungeon culminates in a unique, hand-crafted boss designed to test your skill, timing, and adaptability.

  • 80+ Enemy Types Encounter a diverse roster of foes, from corrupted souls to colossal monstrosities that evolve as you progress.

  • Dungeon Finales that Hit Hard Known as Guardians, they exist for one purpose. To return you to the void. They’re ruthless, unpredictable, and demand mastery of everything you’ve learned within the dungeon.

  • Evolve Before You Fall Strengthen your build, discover lucid powers, and push your limits before stepping into the arena.
1800250.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
